GUCCI Horsebit Embroidered Tape Crewneck Sweatshirt features a composite fabric structure with a 26-count double yarn face layer and a 10-count yarn fish scale terry loop backing, weighing 380 g/m². It uses 21-count 1x1 ribbing at the collar, cuffs, and hem, weighing 470 g, ensuring exceptional thickness, firmness, and shape retention in key areas. The 26-count double yarn creates a smooth, delicate, and durable surface with excellent appearance and colorfastness. The 10-count fish scale terry loop backing forms a unique textured fleece inside, providing exceptional warmth and softness. The sweatshirt combines a structured exterior with a cozy interior.

Eco-friendly elastic printing uses water-based inks and polymer crosslinking technology, offering excellent stretchability that moves with the fabric without cracking. The print has a matte finish, soft and smooth to the touch, without the stiffness of traditional plastisol prints, while maintaining breathability. It delivers strong color coverage, durability, and comfort.

Core-spun 3D embroidery is crafted by placing foam padding beneath a dense embroidery layer, fully covered with thread to create highly raised, rounded, and full 3D patterns with striking visual impact. The padding enhances abrasion resistance and compression recovery, ensuring the design remains crisp and dimensional after repeated wear and washing, combining decoration with durability.

The garment features straight, fine stitching, soft and comfortable fabric, consistent color without shading, and pairs well with matching items for versatile styling. Custom trims and complete labeling included. Unisex design.
